agent_all.description: When `true`, the query runs on all agents.

agent_ids.description: A list of agent IDs to run the query on.

agent_platforms.description: A list of agent platforms to run the query on.

agent_policy_ids.description: A list of agent policy IDs to run the query on.

alert_ids.description: A list of alert IDs associated with the live query.

case_ids.description: A list of case IDs associated with the live query.

ecs_mapping.description: Map osquery results columns or static values to Elastic Common Schema (ECS) fields

event_ids.description: A list of event IDs associated with the live query.

metadata.description: Custom metadata object associated with the live query.

pack_id.description: The ID of the pack you want to run, retrieve, update, or delete.

queries.description: An array of queries to run.

query.description: The SQL query you want to run.

saved_query_id.description: The ID of a saved query.
